name: Indiana Persimmon Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Lightly grease and flour two 9x5-inch or three 8x4-inch loaf pans.
3. Combine the raisins and brandy in a separate bowl; set aside.
4. In a large bowl, mix together the brown sugar, remaining sugar, persimmon pulp, and oil.
5. Add eggs one at a time to the mixture, beating well after each addition.
6. Sift dry ingredients (flour, baking soda, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg) into another bowl.
7. Gradually add the sifted dry ingredients to the egg mixture, stirring in the brandied raisins and walnuts.
8. Pour batter evenly into prepared pans.
9. Bake for 1 hour, checking with a cake tester to ensure doneness; adjust time if necessary.
10. Makes about 16 slices.
